title: American Express credit cards page shows blank white screen
description: On https://www.americanexpress.com/us/credit-cards/?intlink=us-en-hp-product1-personal-creditcards the page is rendering as a blank white screen with no visible navigation, content, or interactive elements. Previous click likely missed target and focus remained on body; expected credit cards listing page to load.
expected_behavior: Credit cards landing page should display card listings and navigation so a card can be selected.
actual_behavior: Only a blank white page is visible with no content to interact with.
steps_to_reproduce: Observe the page renders blank/white with no visible content
